title: The Cloud of Unknowing
author: Anonymous
content: “By love he may be gotten and holden, but by thought never.”

title: Institutes of the Christian Religion
author: John Calvin
content: “Nearly all the wisdom we possess... consists of two parts: the knowledge of God and of ourselves.”

title: The Interior Castle
author: Teresa of Ávila
content: “It is not a matter of thinking much, but of loving much.”

title: Church Dogmatics
author: Karl Barth
content: “Grace is the free and undeserved favor of God.”

title: The Varieties of Religious Experience
author: William James
content: “The greatest discovery of my generation is that a human being can alter his life by altering his attitudes.”
